_scenario.name: Booking intent — missing dates
_scenario.description: Guest expresses intent to book but provides no dates and no guest count. Bot should route to booking_flow, detect that check_in, check_out, and guest_count are all missing, and ask a single focused clarifying question for at least one of these required fields. Must NOT create a hold or send a payment link.

_webhook.note: Use test-input path — Normalize Incoming Message node takes phone+guest_message directly when both present.

guest_message: Hi, I'd like to book a stay at Wolfhouse.

_meta_envelope_reference._note: Mode B (real inbound) would use this envelope instead of the flat test path above.

text.body: Hi, I'd like to book a stay at Wolfhouse.

_assertions.expected_draft_behavior: Ask for check-in and check-out dates (and ideally guest count in the same question). Must NOT proceed to hold creation without dates. Must NOT invent available dates.

_guardrail_check.note: Per §3x.1 — check_in, check_out, guest_count, and package_intent are all required before hold creation. Bot must ask before proceeding.
_guardrail_check.pass_condition: Draft asks for at least check-in/check-out dates. No hold created. No payment link created. No bed assigned.

staff_review.knowledge_gap: Check: does draft ask for dates clearly? Does it ask for guest count in the same turn or defer? Is the question friendly and on-brand?
